design_inspiration: Netflix hero meets Hotstar dark premium UI, Zerodha/CRED/Groww quality level.

headings.usage: H1, H2, large numbers. Brings the cinematic, premium edtech authority.

body.usage: Subtitles, body text, UI elements, button text. Clean and modern.

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-[#1a1a2e]/80 border-b border-white/10
elements: Logo: 'SpardhaHub' text in Playfair Display with gold accent on 'Hub'

hero.layout: Min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center pt-32 pb-20 relative overflow-hidden text-center
hero.headline: Crack UPSC, MPSC, CA & More (Apply bg-gradient-to-r from-[#EF9F27] to-[#F7C97E] text-transparent bg-clip-text on 'UPSC, MPSC, CA & More')
hero.subheadline: Personalized roadmaps • Live vacancy tracker • AI-powered study planner.
hero.email_capture_form: Flex container (row on desktop, col on mobile) gap-3 w-full max-w-md mx-auto mt-8. Input field with placeholder 'Enter your email address' styled with glassmorphism (bg-white/5, border-white/20, text-white).

ctas.primary: 'Start Your Journey Free' - Used as the submit button for the email form. Solid gold bg-[#EF9F27] text-[#1a1a2e] font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(239,159,39,0.4)] transition-all.
ctas.secondary: 'Watch Demo' - Outline button (border border-white/20) with play icon, placed near or below the form.

hero.background: Cinematic dark navy (#1a1a2e) base. Use 'react-tsparticles' for subtle geometric nodes/stars in gold and purple. Radial gradient vignette overlay.

floating_cards.description: 3 Glassmorphic animated countdown cards (UPSC 2026, MPSC 2026, SSC 2026) floating around the main hero content.
floating_cards.card_style: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-4 rounded-xl shadow-lg max-w-[200px] text-left text-sm

stats_bar.layout: Grid of 4 items, border-y border-white/10 py-12 bg-white/[0.02]
stats_bar.item_style: text-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1

features_section.headline: Your Ultimate Arsenal
features_section.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mt-16
features_section.card_style: Glassmorphism panel (bg-white/5, border border-white/10, rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all).

items.title: Smart Roadmap
items.desc: Step-by-step personalized learning paths for your specific exam goals.

items.title: Progress Tracker
items.desc: Real-time analytics to measure your daily mock test performance.

items.title: Daily Current Affairs
items.desc: Bite-sized updates and news directly related to the UPSC syllabus.

items.title: Age Eligibility Checker
items.desc: Instantly verify if you qualify for upcoming state and central exams.

items.title: Salary Calculator
items.desc: Estimate in-hand salaries post 7th pay commission for all target posts.

items.title: Exam Alerts
items.desc: Never miss a deadline with automated notifications for form fill-ups.

watch_demo_modal.description: Glassmorphic Dialog (Shadcn) triggered by 'Watch Demo' CTA. Contains a 16:9 YouTube video placeholder div with a play icon and dark thumbnail overlay.

footer.content: Brand logo 'SpardhaHub', tagline 'Your Goal. Our Path.', copyright 2026, social links.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for hero elements (duration 0.8s, delayChildren 0.2s).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons need hover scaling (scale: 1.02) or glow effects.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion 'whileInView' for feature cards to fade up as user scrolls.

images.description: Dark architectural abstract element for subtle texture overlay in background
